description: Product description Product Description Make this Christmas unforgettable with our 10-piece festive gift set featuring 10 cute keychains, 10 kraft cards and 10 red organza bags. With charming designs like Santa, snowman, reindeer and sleigh, it’s perfect for Secret Santa, stocking fillers or holiday party favours. A cheerful way to share love and laughter this festive season! Package Including 10 × Christmas Keyrings 10 × Xmas Cards 10 × Organza Bags Please note 1. Please allow 1-2cm differences due to manual measurement. 2. The colors may exist slight difference due to different screens. 3. We do our best to offer better products. Please feel free to leave us a message if you have any questions. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Keep away from naked flame or direct heat sources
